selection_reason: Retained as the baseline for 15 paired geometry comparisons against the superellipsoid.
Reduces mean boundary residual in 15/15 conditions; volume proxy improves in 2/15 conditions, while distance metrics are summarized separately as geometric-risk diagnostics.
Stable parsimonious baseline; lower validation error than the coupled model in 56/105 paired condition-state comparisons, without statistical dominance.
Coupled model improves validation in 49/105 paired condition-state comparisons, but the advantage is not robust.
